scripts.build: npm run build -w @bunyang-flow/shared && npm run build -w @bunyang-flow/api && npm run build -w @bunyang-flow/web
scripts.check: npm run check -w @bunyang-flow/shared && npm run check -w @bunyang-flow/api && npm run check -w @bunyang-flow/web
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,web "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.dev:api: npm run build -w @bunyang-flow/shared && npm run dev -w @bunyang-flow/api
scripts.dev:web: npm run build -w @bunyang-flow/shared && npm run dev -w @bunyang-flow/web
